file_insights.changes: Added two availability check functions: is_adapter_available and get_available_adapters
function_added: is_adapter_available: Checks if a command exists in PATH by using 'which' wrapped with 'do { ^which } | complete'
get_available_adapters: Filters a standard set of adapters (claude, ollama, codex) to return only those available on system
file_insights.test_coverage: Added 5 new assertions covering: positive case (sh exists), negative case (non-existent command), list type validation, and adapter name validation

patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents script failure when external command exits with non-zero code; allows checking exit codes
Idiomatic Nushell functional composition for filtering based on predicate functions
Runtime type checking to ensure function returns expected data structure

patterns_discovered.example: Testing both positive (sh available) and negative (fake command) cases
patterns_discovered.benefit: Comprehensive validation of edge cases and failure scenarios

gotchas_discovered.issue: External command invocation requires caret operator
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Always use ^ prefix for external commands in Nushell to distinguish from built-ins

gotchas_discovered.issue: Exit code checking pattern needed for safe failures
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Without 'do' and 'complete', a non-zero exit code would fail the entire script

gotchas_discovered.example: Function returns dynamic list based on PATH, not static list
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Tests include both positive and negative cases to handle different system configurations

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - Implemented two complementary availability check functions with full test coverage. Functions properly handle PATH resolution, edge cases, and provide filtering capability for the adapter ecosystem.

recommendations.suggestion: Consider memoizing availability check results if function is called repeatedly in hot paths
recommendations.rationale: Repeated `which` invocations are disk I/O expensive; caching could improve performance

recommendations.suggestion: Add error logging or warnings when expected adapters are unavailable
recommendations.rationale: Silent filtering of missing adapters could mask installation/setup issues during troubleshooting

recommendations.suggestion: Document that availability checking respects current PATH environment
recommendations.rationale: Helps users understand why availability results may differ across environments
